zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Huntingfield於1185年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可門達哈姆時，她的父親William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk26歲，母親Isabel Gressenhall31歲。她於從1200年到1207年與Richard de Solers在英國結婚。她去世於1236年3月30日在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Huntingfield于1185年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可門達哈姆时，她的父亲William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk26岁，母亲Isabel Gressenhall31岁。她于从1200年到1207年与Richard de Solers在英国结婚。她去世于1236年3月30日在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Huntingfield was born in 1185, in Mendham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk, was 26 and her mother, Isabel Gressenhall, was 31. She married Richard de Solers from 1200 to 1207, in England. She died on 30 March 1236, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Huntingfield est née en 1185, à Mendham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel Gressenhall, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Solers du 1200 au 1207, à Angleterre. Elle est décédée le 30 mars 1236, à Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Huntingfield 1185 in Mendham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk 26 und ihre Mutter Isabel Gressenhall 31. Sie hat von 1200 bis 1207 in England Richard de Solers geheiratet. Sie starb am 30. März 1236 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

ht.Caernarvonshire, Wales: Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Huntingfield è nata il nel 1185 nel Mendham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Isabel Gressenhall, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Solers da 1200 a 1207, nel England. Morì il 30 marzo 1236, nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Huntingfieldが1185年にイギリスイギリススフォルクメンドハムで生まれた時，父William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolkは26歳，母Isabel Gressenhallは31歳であった。から1200年まで1207年にイギリスでRichard de Solersと結婚した。彼女は1236年3月30日にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Huntingfield(이)가 1185년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 멘드함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Gressenhall(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1200년 부터 1207년 까지 영국에서 Richard de Solers(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1236년 3월 30일 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Huntingfield nasceu em 1185, em Mendham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Gressenhall, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Solers de 1200 a 1207, em Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 30 de março de 1236, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Huntingfield родилась в 1185 г. в местности мендхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Gressenhall, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Solers с 1200 по 1207 в местности Англия. Она умерла 30 марта 1236 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Huntingfield nació en 1185, en Mendham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabel Gressenhall, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Richard de Solers desde 1200 hasta 1207, en Inglaterra. Murió el 30 de marzo de 1236, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años.
